name: latency-hunter-toolkit
description: Latency Hunter Toolkit — a quant-engineering Claude Code plugin for solo traders. Five skills: backtest-guard (回测照妖镜), latency-audit (热路径猎手), connector-forge (连接器锻造), orderbook-sanity (数据照妖镜) and risk-config-lint (风控体检). No alpha, no keys — engineering only.

plugins.name: latency-hunter
plugins.description: Five quant-engineering skills: audit your backtests (backtest-guard), your C++ hot path (latency-audit), your market data (orderbook-sanity) and your risk config (risk-config-lint) — and forge production-grade Binance/OKX connectors (connector-forge). The unglamorous engineering layer every solo quant needs.
